<think> I know that the head coaching position of the Indiana Pacers was previously held by Frank Vogel, but I'm not sure who was promoted to the position in May 2016. I'm trying to remember if it was a player who had a strong playing career with the Pacers or if they were a former player from another team. I'm going to try to remember if there was a specific news article or announcement that mentioned the new head coach. I'm going to try to remember if it was a player who had experience as an assistant coach or in another coaching role before being promoted to the head coaching position. I'm thinking of players like Mark Jackson, who was a former NBA player and had experience as an assistant coach with the Golden State Warriors. I'm going to try to see if Mark Jackson was promoted to the head coaching position of the Pacers in May 2016. I'm going to check my knowledge to see if I can confirm this.</think>
<answer> Mark Jackson </answer>
